Hero.title1: Digital Transformation on the Shop Floor:
Hero.subtitle: We deliver true Industry 4.0. We natively integrate advanced management software with intelligent hardware to build a hyper-connected, autonomous, and predictive factory.

MES.sectionSubtitle: The brain of your industrial operation. Total visibility from production order to shipping.
MES.card1Text: Industrial panels on every line. Real-time OEE tracking, downtime, and highly traceable production order execution.
MES.card2Text: Standardized digital forms, consolidated operational audit history, and paperless capture of critical variables.
MES.card3Text: Interactive screens (Wall of Fame) signaling line status, losses, and real-time productivity to the entire factory.
MES.card4Text: Modern 'Bottom-Up' operator management, leadership balancing, and automated tracking of factory training.
MES.card5Text: Visual management for continuous improvement, Kaizen idea submission, and digital A3 panels for structured problem solving on the factory floor.
MES.card6Text: Digital inspection routines for leadership on the shop floor, with photo attachments and tracking of improvement opportunities.
MES.card7Text: Automated safety cross, incident reporting, and investigative analysis of operational safety to guarantee a zero-accident environment.
MES.card8Text: Dynamic terminals for bottom-up leadership evaluation surveys, workforce mood index, and tracking of multifaceted training (ILUO).
MES.card9Text: Structured control over tool check-in/check-out, links to production BOMs, and asset returns within the consumables ecosystem.

IoT.sectionSubtitle: Cutting-edge industrial equipment to digitize the physical world and integrate it into the MES.
IoT.card1Text: Vibration and temperature sensors continuously monitoring active equipment health.
IoT.card2Text: Facial/RFID attendance control integrated directly with shift costs in the central MES.
IoT.card3Text: Level sensors, material flow, and seamless integration with high-precision shop floor scales.
IoT.card4Text: Direct PLC actuation via dedicated IoT Gateway to close the automation loop.

Benefits.title: Why choose our system?
Benefits.b1Text: Anticipate downtimes and increase the uptime of your machine fleet.
Benefits.b2Text: Inspect parts with technology that removes human error from the equation.
Benefits.b3Text: The whole factory speaking the same language, reporting bottlenecks in seconds.

Hardware.title: Industrial IoT Hardware
Hardware.subtitle: We design and deploy industrial-grade equipment for the most demanding environments. Connectivity and robustness at every network node.

Footer.slogan: We transform conventional factories into intelligent centers of excellence through proprietary software and hardware.
